117	107	111	105	119	CMB124	104	108	118	ELE108	106	125	216	CMB238	211	212	213	230	210	228	229	231	227	226	CMB221	SMP203	HPH214	HPH229	HPH232	HPH233	HPH234	HPH236	HPH253	HPH258	HPH215	HPH228	HPH230	HPH231	HPH238	HPH248	HPH249	HPH255	HPH257	HPH259	217	222	236	328	364	361	329	367	372	373	374	381	334	366	325	327	331	332	333	336	360	362	363	365	323	330	335	324	CMB350	COM3001	SMP313	HPH331	HPH343	HPH346	HPH350	HPH351	HPH357	HPH366	HPH368	HPH340	HPH341	HPH342	HPH344	HPH347	HPH349	HPH358	HPH367	HPH369	EDC309	EDC311	EGH325	GPL322	SPR320	EDC306	EDC307	GPL313	321	358	431	475	477	478	480	481	484	485	4106	471	473	482	487	488	476	486	SMP4140	SMP435	461	4116
20	10	50	10	10	10	10	10	10	20	10	20	70	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	70	10	20	10	10	10	10	10	20	20	20	20	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	10	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	20	10	10	60	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	15	60	15	30
